name: Inventory System
description: Grid-based inventory with item stacking, weight limits, equipment slots, and drag-drop signals. Supports weapons, armor, consumables, and quest items.

slots.name: parent
slots.description: Parent node path for the InventoryManager

slots.name: max_weight
slots.description: Maximum carry weight (0 to disable weight limit)

slots.description: Default max stack size for stackable items
